description: A plain candid operational photograph from Operation Tidal Wave with no on-image text, slogans, or agency seal overlay. Shot outdoors in a sunny residential area (white stucco buildings, green hedges, palm fronds, an air-conditioning condenser unit), it shows officers escorting a handcuffed man up a grassy strip between buildings, all photographed from behind. The detained man in the center wears a white t-shirt printed with an American flag and is flanked by two agents in tactical vests: one vest reads 'POLICE / ICE,' the other reads 'FBI / POLICE'; a third heavily armed tactical officer is at far left. The image documents a multi-agency immigration arrest. Marked is_designed=false because it is a documentary photo without graphic/meme design treatment. Tweet context describes ICE Miami and Florida law enforcement arresting nearly 800 illegal aliens during #OperationTidalWave.
notable_text: (no on-image text; vest labels POLICE/ICE and FBI/POLICE)
